title: coelogyne aspera
intro: Coelogyne aspera, also known as the rough orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to tropical forests in Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coelogyne aspera include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its roots are also used in traditional remedies.
